title: SharpFPS
description: SharpFPS – A lightweight PvP modpack that boosts FPS and sharpens your combat experience.
body:
SharpFPS is a lightweight Minecraft 1.21 modpack built for players who want smooth performance and an edge in PvP.

⚡ Performance

Optimized with the best FPS-boosting mods for lag-free gameplay

Faster loading times and reduced stutter

⚔️ PvP Ready

Includes popular PvP utility mods for better combat control

Clean visuals and HUD improvements to keep the focus on the fight

✅ Perfect for competitive servers or casual play — SharpFPS makes your game sharper, faster, and ready for battle.
